notes: Header ghost logo swap. Replaced the IMG_7711 ghost (right-eye dark hollow/notch, uneven eyes) with a corrected render (IMG_7728). Source verified before embed: PNG/RGBA, all four corners alpha=0 (genuine transparency, not a flattened/black or mislabeled-JPEG matte), eyes symmetric within ~3% by area with both solid-filled and no interior dark notch. Pipeline: trim to alpha bbox (1408->1000x1110) -> square-pad transparent (1110x1110) -> 88px LANCZOS. Naive LANCZOS chosen over premultiplied after on-dark-header comparison (premul read blockier; black-edge fringe is invisible on PHANTOM's dark header anyway). Single-line data-URI replace on .hdr-ghost-img (the file's only data:image URI); base64 15856->17452 chars (+1596 bytes, heavier due to holographic glitch texture; kept full RGBA rather than quantize to avoid banding the glow gradients). Alert-state amber hue-shift + menu wiring untouched. Verified: JS parse OK (both inline scripts), CSS brace-balanced, three version stamps aligned at v1.6.58.
